channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Women's College Hoops Spotlight: Why UCLA Has a Hold on the Big Ten Title Race
item.description: With just five games remaining, No. 2 UCLA is closing in on its first Big Ten regular-season title.

item.title: MLB Free Agency Rumors, Buzz: Toronto Blue Jays Slugger Out Most of 2026
item.description: Keeping track of players who may be on the move, manager comings and goings, and other buzz from around the majors.

item.title: Men's College Hoops Spotlight: St. John's Getting Hot at Just the Right Time
item.description: While it might have taken longer than most people expected, St. John's pieces seem like they're finally falling into place.

item.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Astros Closer Josh Hader has 'Bicep Inflammation'
item.description: It's time to dust off those ball bags — MLB spring training has commenced. Keeping track of the biggest news ahead of Opening Day.

item.title: 2026 MLB Free Agent Signings, Trades: Rockies Add 2 SPs; Jordan Montgomery Signs
item.description: Keeping tabs on all of MLB's notable free agency signings, trades, and extensions ahead of the 2026 season.

item.title: Lemley, Kauf take gold, silver for U.S. in moguls
item.description: Elizabeth Lemley and Jaelin Kauf won gold and silver for the United States in women's freestyle moguls skiing on Wednesday.

item.title: Sources: Ex-Titans HC Callahan joins Giants' staff
item.description: The Giants are hiring former Titans head coach Brian Callahan as their quarterbacks coach and passing game coordinator, sources told ESPN.

item.title: Brandon Figueroa rises after upset win over Nick Ball
item.description: Brandon Figueroa stopped Nick Ball in round 12 to claim the WBA featherweight championship and climb in the rankings. Here are the latest ESPN divisio...

item.title: WNBA player offers to testify vs. Pearce in DV case
item.description: An attorney for WNBA player Rickea Jackson said she is "willing to testify" against Falcons player James Pearce Jr. if the domestic violence charges a...

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Salah's agent in Al Ittihad talks as star open to Liverpool exit
item.description: Liverpool star Mohamed Salah has given his agent the green light to open talks with Saudi Pro League club Al Ittihad, Transfer Talk has the latest.
